case_title: PATIRIS, YIOTA vs. SCHWARTZ, STEVE et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT SCHWARTZ, STEVE ZHANG, KATHY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHWARTZ, STEVE ZHANG, KATHY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 444 HYDE ST, #61, SF, CA $1,050.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,050.00, STAYED UNTIL JUN-13-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT'S SECURITY DEPOSIT SHALL BE RETAINED BY PLTF, NO MOTIONS BY DEFTS FOR RELIEF SHALL BE SOUGHT OR PERMITTED. PLTF TO RECEIVE DEFT'S WRITTEN NOTICE THAT THEY HAVE LEFT PREMISES AND PLTF SHALL FILE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT & FILE DISMISSAL OF THIS CASE.
